meta.purpose: Ground-truth values for HME classical-metric unit tests and C2M/KGEnp/DE cross-checks.

Hydrostats.version: 1.0.0 (master; metrics are a re-export of HydroErr)

hydroeval.use: numeric cross-check only; no code reuse

diag-eff.use: numeric cross-check only; no code reuse

meta.nan_semantics: HydroErr default replace_nan=None pairwise-drops NaN rows (verified in util.treat_values) == HME 'pairwise-drop'.
meta.shift_convention: positive shift = simulation LATE by k steps

nan8.note: NaN pattern; HydroErr default (replace_nan=None) pairwise-drops rows -> defines HME 'pairwise-drop' semantics. Effective pairs: idx 0,3,4,5.

event_tri.note: Two triangular events on baseflow 1.0; sim = obs shifted +2 steps (late). For DTW / peak-timing / Wasserstein hand checks.

nan8.note: NaN pattern; HydroErr default (replace_nan=None) pairwise-drops rows -> defines HME 'pairwise-drop' semantics. Effective pairs: idx 0,3,4,5.

event_tri.note: Two triangular events on baseflow 1.0; sim = obs shifted +2 steps (late). For DTW / peak-timing / Wasserstein hand checks.

convention_pins.note: Paper/Table-2 convention: PBIAS = 100*sum(Qobs-Qsim)/sum(Qobs); positive = UNDERestimation. Record hydroeval/hydroGOF sign for mapping.
